# TebaAi Project Structure Template

Canonical bootstrap values:

```text
Project directory: TebaAi
GitHub repository: TebaAi
Visible brand: Teba AI
Technical identifier: tebaai
Environment prefix: TEBAAI_
Backend: Litestar
Frontend: Astro.js + Svelte 5 runes
Backend port: 7008
Astro port: 3008
Backend entrypoint: SrvRestAstroLS_v1/backend/ls_iMotorSoft_Srv01.py
ASGI object: app
```

Do not create `backend/app.py` unless a future ADR approves the exception.

Mermaid is the canonical diagram source. SVG, PNG and Excalidraw are optional
derived artifacts.
